title: This High-Yield Dividend Stock Could Beef Up Your Portfolio
text: Burger King's parent company holds serious growth potential and serves up tasty dividends.

title: A PENNE FOR YOUR SAUCE: PIZZA HUT INTRODUCES NEW OVEN-BAKED PASTAS® TO MENUS NATIONWIDE
text: The all-new oven-baked pasta line features four new recipes: Chicken Alfredo, Italian Meats, Cheesy Alfredo and Veggie PLANO, Texas , July 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Pizza Hut, known for being the pizza lovers' pizza, is now just as much for pasta lovers with the introduction of its new Oven-Baked Pastas. The new pasta line marks the first time Pizza Hut has not only expanded the pasta lineup to offer even more delicious variety but has also completely revamped their pasta offering to include more premium ingredients and savory sauces.

title: Yum! Brands Highlights Progress on Climate, Sustainable Packaging and Equity & Inclusion Priorities in Annual Citizenship & Sustainability Report
text: LOUISVILLE, Ky.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Yum! released its annual Global Citizenship & Sustainability Report, highlighting its stewardship of its people, food and planet.

title: 2 Restaurant Stocks to Ride Out the Storm, According to Goldman Sachs
text: Analyst Jared Garber is bullish on both Yum! Brands and Chipotle Mexican Grill.

title: 5 Consumer Discretionary Stocks to Buy on Strong U.S. Demand
text: We have narrowed our search to five consumer discretionary stocks. These are: 2NXST, VAC, YUM, CHH and GOLF

title: 4 Restaurant Stocks to Watch Amid Growing Challenges
text: Restaurant sales are growing despite rising prices, helping stocks like Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (ARCO), Yum! Brands, Inc. (YUM), Sweetgreen, Inc. (SG) and Dave & Buster's Entertainment, Inc. (PLAY).

title: Mac is Back! KFC Brings Back Fan-Favorite Mac & Cheese Bowls for $5 for a Limited Time
text: $5 Mac & Cheese Bowls available as a digital exclusive on KFC mobile app and KFC.com starting July 11, available in restaurants on July 18 LOUISVILLE, Ky. , July 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The fans have spoken.

title: Yum! Brands (YUM) Pizza Hut Partners to Open Stores in Saudi
text: Yum! Brands (YUM) Pizza Hut teams up with Americana Restaurants to boost Saudi Arabia presence. The agreement includes opening approximately 100 branches over the next three years.

title: Yum! Brands (YUM) Plans to Sell KFC Restaurants in Russia
text: Yum! Brands (YUM) is in advanced discussion with a local buyer to sell its KFC restaurants and franchise rights in Russia.

title: Yum Brands says it is close to selling its Russian KFC business
text: After selling its Russian Pizza Hut franchises in May, Yum Brands is close to selling its KFC restaurants.

title: Yum Brands close to selling KFC business in Russia
text: Yum Brands Inc said on Tuesday it is in advanced talks to sell its KFC restaurants and franchise rights in Russia to a local buyer, after which the company plans to fully exit the country.
